restore_note: This section's cases were accidentally deleted from TestRail (section tree intact, 0 cases live). Restored from the last-known content of ai-context/cases-login.json, converted to draft schema for a fresh /grill-section pass before republishing. No original Suite 6 source_case_ids were recorded when this was first migrated.

cases.title: [Login] Verify that the login page renders with all required fields and controls
cases.preconditions: User is on the Login page.

steps.content: Verify the Email address field is present.
steps.expected: Email address field should be visible. It carries no visual required marker (no asterisk, no `required`/`aria-required` attribute) — its mandatory nature is enforced only on submit (see the empty-field validation case).

steps.content: Verify the Password field is present.
steps.expected: Password field should be visible. Like the Email field, it has no visual required marker; it is enforced only on submit.

steps.content: Verify the show/hide toggle (eye icon) is present on the Password field.
steps.expected: Eye icon should be visible on the Password field.

steps.content: Verify the "Log In" button is present.
steps.expected: "Log In" button should be visible and interactive.

steps.content: Verify the "Forgot your password?" link is present.
steps.expected: "Forgot your password?" link should be visible and interactive.

steps.content: Verify the "Sign Up" link is present.
steps.expected: "Sign Up" link should be visible and interactive.

cases.rewrite_notes: Restored verbatim from prior publish (ai-context/cases-login.json) — no content change.

cases.title: [Login] Verify that valid credentials log the user in and redirect to the Dashboard
cases.preconditions: User has a registered account and is on the Login page.

steps.content: Enter valid credentials in the email and password fields.
steps.expected: Credentials should be accepted in the fields.

steps.content: Click "Log In".
steps.expected: Dashboard page should be displayed.

cases.rewrite_notes: Restored verbatim from prior publish (ai-context/cases-login.json) — no content change.

cases.title: [Login] Verify that a successful login redirects back to the originally-requested page
cases.preconditions: User attempted to access a protected page while logged out (e.g. navigated directly to /consent-logs) and was redirected to the Login page with a `next` parameter (e.g. `/login?next=%2Fconsent-logs`).

steps.content: Enter valid credentials and click "Log In".
steps.expected: User is redirected to the originally-requested page (e.g. `/consent-logs`), not unconditionally to the Dashboard.

cases.rewrite_notes: Found during gap-hunting — no existing draft case covers the `next` redirect-preservation behavior; Case 2 only covers direct navigation to /login.

cases.title: [Login] Verify that pressing Enter in the password field submits the login form
cases.preconditions: User is on the Login page with valid credentials entered.

steps.content: Enter valid credentials in the email and password fields, then press Enter instead of clicking "Log In".
steps.expected: The form submits the same as clicking "Log In" — user is logged in and redirected to the Dashboard (or the originally-requested page, per the `next` redirect case).

cases.rewrite_notes: Found during gap-hunting — no existing draft case covers keyboard-driven form submission.

cases.title: [Login] Verify that login with an email address is case-insensitive
cases.preconditions: User has a registered account and is on the Login page.

steps.content: Enter the registered email address in a different letter case (e.g. all uppercase) along with the correct password, then click "Log In".
steps.expected: User is logged in successfully and redirected to the Dashboard — email matching is case-insensitive.

cases.rewrite_notes: Found during gap-hunting — no existing draft case covers email case-insensitivity.

cases.title: [Login] Verify that submitting login with an empty email field shows a validation error
cases.preconditions: User is on the Login page.

steps.content: Enter a valid password in the password field, leaving the email field empty.
steps.expected: Password should be entered.

steps.content: Click "Log In".
steps.expected: "Email is required" error message should be displayed.

cases.rewrite_notes: Restored verbatim from prior publish (ai-context/cases-login.json) — no content change.

cases.title: [Login] Verify that submitting login with an invalid email format shows a validation error
cases.preconditions: User is on the Login page.

steps.content: Enter an invalid email address (e.g. "notanemail", no "@") in the email field.
steps.expected: Invalid email should be entered.

steps.content: Enter a password in the password field.
steps.expected: Password should be entered.

steps.content: Click "Log In".
steps.expected: The form does not submit (no request is sent to the login API). The browser's own native email-format validation blocks it and shows its native tooltip near the field (Chrome: "Please include an '@' in the email address. '<value>' is missing an '@'.") — this is not an app-rendered message, so exact wording is browser/locale-dependent. The app itself displays no custom error message for a pure format error.

cases.rewrite_notes: Restored verbatim from prior publish (ai-context/cases-login.json) — no content change.

cases.title: [Login] Verify that submitting login with a non-existing email shows an authentication error
cases.preconditions: User is on the Login page.

steps.content: Enter an email address that has no registered account.
steps.expected: Email should be entered.

steps.content: Enter a password.
steps.expected: Password should be entered.

steps.content: Click "Log In".
steps.expected: "Invalid email/password. Please try again" error message should be displayed.

cases.rewrite_notes: Restored verbatim from prior publish (ai-context/cases-login.json) — no content change.

cases.title: [Login] Verify that the password visibility toggle reveals and hides the entered password
cases.preconditions: User is on the Login page.

steps.content: Enter a password in the password field.
steps.expected: The entered characters should be masked (displayed as dots).

steps.content: Click the eye icon on the password field.
steps.expected: The entered password should be displayed in plain text.

cases.rewrite_notes: Restored verbatim from prior publish (ai-context/cases-login.json) — no content change.

cases.title: [Login] Verify that submitting login with an empty password field shows a validation error
cases.preconditions: User is on the Login page.

steps.content: Enter a valid email address in the email field, leaving the password field empty.
steps.expected: Email should be entered.

steps.content: Click "Log In".
steps.expected: "Password is required" error message should be displayed.

cases.rewrite_notes: Restored verbatim from prior publish (ai-context/cases-login.json) — no content change.

cases.title: [Login] Verify that submitting login with an incorrect password shows an authentication error
cases.preconditions: User is on the Login page. A registered account exists for the email being used.

steps.content: Enter a registered email address in the email field.
steps.expected: Email should be entered.

steps.content: Enter an incorrect password in the password field.
steps.expected: Incorrect password should be entered.

steps.content: Click "Log In".
steps.expected: "Invalid email/password. Please try again" error message should be displayed.

cases.rewrite_notes: Restored verbatim from prior publish (ai-context/cases-login.json) — no content change.

cases.preconditions: User is on the Login page.

steps.content: Click the "Sign Up" link.
steps.expected: Sign Up page should be displayed.

cases.rewrite_notes: Restored verbatim from prior publish (ai-context/cases-login.json) — no content change. No run_type set in the original publish.

steps.content: Click the "Forgot your password?" link.
